overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the Rancho Coronado district, transitioning from a desert-urban street with red rock formations into an overgrown public park containing palm trees, benches, and a distinctive green six-wheeled vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert urban street with traffic infrastructure and red rock backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street approaching a traffic intersection

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock hills forming the backdrop of the urban area
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs attached
low-rise commercial structures with colorful facades
multi-lane paved road with lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert-urban street with striking red rock formations visible in the distance. The camera moves forward along the asphalt road toward a traffic intersection, passing commercial buildings on the right. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transitioning to public park entrance

events.description: passing the Rancho Coronado Public Park sign, transitioning from urban plaza into park grounds

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and entering the park plaza, following pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead into the park entrance

entered.detail: large concrete sign with digital display reading 'RANCHO CORONADO PUBLIC PARK'
wide tiled pedestrian area leading into the park
tall palm trees marking the park entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street intersection onto a paved plaza, following other pedestrians toward the park entrance. At 19 seconds, the Rancho Coronado Public Park sign comes into view, marking the transition from the urban street into the park grounds. Tall palm trees become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown public park with palm trees and scattered benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the overgrown park path observing the environment and distant city towers

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete park bench reading a document

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail winding through the park vegetation
concrete park benches scattered along the path
tall grass and wild plants growing throughout the park
futuristic high-rise apartment buildings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the park, the scene shifts to an overgrown natural environment with dirt paths and dense vegetation. Concrete benches are scattered along the trail, with one occupied by a reading pedestrian. Futuristic residential towers rise in the background, contrasting with the wild park setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: park area with distinctive green six-wheeled vehicle

events.description: discovering a unique green six-wheeled car parked in the grass off the main path

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the green six-wheeled car to examine its details and graffiti

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing near the green car, one appears to be inspecting it

entered.detail: custom green vintage-style car with six wheels and 'Somos la Muerte' graffiti on the side
wall with colorful graffiti art visible behind the car

segments.scene_description: The camera discovers a distinctive green six-wheeled vehicle parked in the grass, featuring custom graffiti reading 'Somos la Muerte.' The camera circles around the car, revealing its unique design and chrome details. A group of NPCs stands nearby, and futuristic towers are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuing through the public park past the vehicle display area

events.description: moving past the green car and continuing deeper along the park trail

agents.ego_description: walking past the car and continuing along the winding park path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the green car behind, the camera continues along the dirt path through the overgrown park. More benches appear in the foreground as the vehicle exits the frame, and the trail winds deeper into the vegetation with residential towers still visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desert-urban street that gradually transitions into an overgrown public park. It begins by moving along an asphalt road toward a traffic intersection, with striking red rock formations and commercial buildings framing the path. As the camera crosses the intersection and follows pedestrians onto a paved plaza, the scene shifts past a park sign and toward a horizon of tall palm trees. The environment then opens into a wilder landscape of dirt paths and dense vegetation dotted with concrete benches, where futuristic residential towers loom in the background. Finally, the camera circles a distinctive green six-wheeled vehicle adorned with graffiti before continuing deeper into the overgrown greenery and winding trails.
